basic_details.job_title: IIM Ahmedabad Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIM Ahmedabad) Academic Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Ahmedabad. A total of 1 Academic Associate vacancy has been announced through the IIM Ahmedabad Academic Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., M.Phil., or first-class MA in Communication or related disciplines such as English/Linguistics/Communication/Public Relations/Sociology/Anthropology/Political Science
qualification.details: Academic Associate (Communication Area): Ph.D., M.Phil., or first-class MA in Communication or related disciplines such as English/Linguistics/Communication/Public Relations/Sociology/Anthropology/Political Science.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month + Rs. 8,000 housing support

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Ahmedabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Academic Associate Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Ahmedabad Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIM Ahmedabad Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Ahmedabad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Ahmedabad Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Academic Associate position at IIM Ahmedabad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Academic Associate position at IIM Ahmedabad is 27th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Academic Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D., M.Phil., or a first-class MA degree in Communication or related fields like English, Linguistics, Public Relations, Sociology, Anthropology, or Political Science.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Academic Associate position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Academic Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 35,000 to Rs. 40,000, along with Rs. 8,000 as housing support.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Academic Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of candidates, followed by a test, and then an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Academic Associate position at IIM Ahmedabad is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the 'Important Links' section of this article. You can download it from there for detailed information.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Academic Associate position?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of IIM Ahmedabad or via the direct 'Apply Online' link provided in the 'Important Links' section. Ensure you fill out the form correctly and submit it before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIM Ahmedabad offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any specific age relaxation policies.
